faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in Mamaroneck?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in Mamaroneck typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500, depending on the size of your home, severity of the infestation, and treatment method chosen. Single-room heat treatments start at $1,200, while whole-home treatments for larger properties may reach $3,500. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: What bed bug treatment methods do you use in Mamaroneck?
faqs.answer: We offer both heat treatment and chemical solutions for Mamaroneck properties. Heat treatment raises room temperatures to 135°F, killing bed bugs at all life stages in one session. Chemical treatments use EPA-approved products applied over multiple visits. Many Mamaroneck clients choose our combination approach for maximum effectiveness and long-term protection.

faqs.question: How quickly can you treat bed bugs in Mamaroneck homes?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day emergency bed bug services throughout Mamaroneck and Westchester County. Heat treatments are typically completed in 6-8 hours for most homes, allowing you to return the same day. Chemical treatments require 2-3 follow-up visits spaced two weeks apart to target all life cycles and ensure complete elimination.

faqs.question: Do you guarantee your bed bug treatments in Mamaroneck?
faqs.answer: Yes, all our bed bug treatments in Mamaroneck come with a 60-day warranty. If bed bugs return within this period, we will re-treat your home at no additional cost. We also provide detailed prevention guidance and follow-up inspections to ensure your Mamaroneck property remains bed bug-free long-term.
